description_long: This object is a round, dark-colored apple with a slightly irregular, faceted surface, giving it a somewhat polygonal appearance. The skin is a deep, almost black shade with subtle glossy highlights and faint patches of lighter gray, suggesting a waxy, reflective finish. The top of the apple features a shallow, indented area where the stem would typically be, though no stem is visible. The overall shape is nearly spherical but not perfectly smooth, with minor undulations and a matte-to-glossy transition across its surface. There are no visible stickers, labels, or blemishes on the exterior. The apple appears dense and solid, typical of a fresh fruit, and would likely feel firm to the touch.
description: A nearly spherical, very dark apple with a glossy, faceted surface and a shallow top indentation.
description_view_0: The apple appears round with a deep, dark surface and subtle faceting; the top indentation is barely visible.
description_view_1: This view shows the shallow top indentation more clearly, with the glossy surface reflecting some light.
description_view_2: The apple looks uniformly round from this angle, with the indentation visible but less pronounced.
description_view_3: A direct side view highlights the faceted, glossy surface and the deep, dark coloration.
